scripts.lint: bunx oxlint --config ../../../../.oxlintrc.json app cli domain flows presentation index.ts main.ts --deny-warnings
scripts.lint:fix: bunx oxlint --config ../../../../.oxlintrc.json app cli domain flows presentation index.ts main.ts --fix
scripts.format: bunx oxfmt --config ../../../../.oxfmtrc.json --write app cli domain flows presentation types index.ts main.ts package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.format:check: bunx oxfmt --config ../../../../.oxfmtrc.json --check app cli domain flows presentation types index.ts main.ts package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run test
